message:
fix: v1.2.1 — fix flaky ops tests, remove ort-incompatible CI targets

- Fix 3 flaky log-capture tests in ops/storage.rs by always asserting
  via deterministic metrics first, then conditionally checking log
  content only when capture wasn't contaminated by concurrent tests
- Remove x86_64/aarch64 linux-musl and x86_64-apple-darwin from full
  release build matrix (ort-sys has no prebuilt ONNX binaries for those
  targets); lite builds still cover all platforms
- Bump fsfs 1.2.0 → 1.2.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankensearch-fsfs"
-version = "1.2.0"
+version = "1.2.1"
 description = "Standalone fsfs CLI for two-tier hybrid local search"
 edition.workspace = true
 rust-version.workspace = true
